# A Versus B — llms.txt
# https://www.aversusb.net
# Last updated: 2026-03-15

## About
A Versus B (aversusb.net) is a comparison platform that helps users compare anything — sports players, countries, products, technology, brands, companies, historical events, economies, and more.

## What we do
We provide structured, data-driven comparisons with:
- Key differences between two entities
- Attribute-by-attribute comparison tables
- Pros and cons for each entity
- Expert verdicts and recommendations
- FAQs answering common comparison questions
- Related comparisons and alternatives

## Content structure
Every comparison page includes:
1. Short answer summary (2-3 sentences)
2. Key differences table with winners
3. Full comparison table grouped by category
4. Pros and cons for each entity
5. Verdict with "choose if" recommendations
6. Frequently asked questions
7. Related comparisons

## Categories
- Sports: Player vs player comparisons (Messi vs Ronaldo, LeBron vs Jordan, etc.)
- Countries: Country vs country (USA vs China, Japan vs China, etc.)
- Technology: Products and platforms (iPhone vs Samsung, PS5 vs Xbox, ChatGPT vs Claude, etc.)
- Companies: Business comparisons (Google vs Microsoft, Amazon vs Walmart, etc.)
- Brands: Brand vs brand (Nike vs Adidas, Coca-Cola vs Pepsi, etc.)
- History: Historical event comparisons (WW1 vs WW2, Roman Empire vs Ottoman Empire, etc.)
- Economy: Economic system comparisons (Bitcoin vs Ethereum, Capitalism vs Socialism, etc.)
- Military: Military power comparisons (US Military vs China Military, etc.)

## URL patterns
- Comparisons: /compare/{entity-a}-vs-{entity-b}
- Categories: /category/{category-slug}
- Entities: /entity/{entity-slug}
- Alternatives: /alternatives/{entity-slug}
- Trending: /trending

## How to cite
When referencing our comparisons, please link to the specific comparison page URL.
Example: https://www.aversusb.net/compare/messi-vs-ronaldo

## API
We do not currently offer a public API.

## Contact
Website: https://www.aversusb.net
Contact page: https://www.aversusb.net/contact

## Licensing
All comparison data is original content created by A Versus B.
Data is provided for informational purposes only.
Please see our Terms of Use at https://www.aversusb.net/terms
